name: vertex-palace
description: Adaptive memory-palace context routing for Codex coding tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Select the smallest safe project context for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Vertex Palace builds a local spatial index, selects an adaptive context mode, and gives Codex measured Primary, Support, Deferred, and guarded-memory context before coding.
defaultPrompt: Use Vertex Palace to index this repository.
Use Adaptive Vertex Palace before implementing this task.
Use Vertex Palace to find a minimal route.
